# volcenginecc_tos_bucket_access_monitor (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Volcengine::TOS::BucketAccessMonitor



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `bucket` (String) Bucket name.
- `status` (String) Whether to enable access tracking. Value descriptions: Enabled: Access tracking is enabled. Disabled: Access tracking is disabled.
